text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan escapes to the beach with friends
to avoid thinking about what comes next. She
doesn't tell them, but she's skipping training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't mince words when I find her, declaring that
she is well and truly a dummy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't mince words when I find her, declaring that
she is well and truly a dummy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's precisely because she's a dummy that she can
fly in the face of common sense and face every
challenge head-on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And when she fights, she's cool. She inspires.
Encouraged by my words and her friends, she
turns once more to racing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Embracing her stupidity, Jordan aims to be the
greatest dummy. Her first step will be taking on
Gold Ship in the Osaka Hai.
